name: CI Alert
description: Dev detects CI failure → Main triages → Telegram notification

steps.action: Investigate the CI failure. Identify the failing job, error message, and likely cause. Write findings to shared/inbox/main/ with subject 'CI Failure Report' and priority 'high'.
Read CI failure report from inbox. Assess severity and impact. If critical, notify Anthony via Telegram with a concise summary and recommended action.
